title: zornia piurensis
intro: Zornia piurensis, also known as Piure, is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest, belonging to the family Fabaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The plant is said to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, Zornia piurensis is typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, often combined with other medicinal plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
